# Agentic HTML Export QA

Agentic HTML Export QA is a hosted remote MCP for agentic HTML export QA MCP.

Website: https://agentichtmlexportqa.clauxel.com/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: agentic HTML export QA MCP
Type: MCP
Default plan: team
MCP endpoint: https://agentichtmlexportqa.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://agentichtmlexportqa.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Registry name: com.clauxel.agentichtmlexportqa/agentichtmlexportqa-mcp
Tools: check_html_export_qa, classify_layout_gap, check_link_summary, issue_export_receipt, export_html_qa_log

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
